sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the National Pension Scheme Short title
sections.text:
(Amendment) Act, 2015, and shall be read as one with the National Cap. 256
Pension Scheme Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: Section two of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment

sections.heading: (1) Subject to the provisions of this Act, a member Retirement
sections.text:
shall retire upon attaining pensionable age. and
condition for
(2) A member may retire on attaining the age of— award of
retirement
(a) fifty-five years if, twelve months before attaining pension
that age, the member notifies the contributing

Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K2.00 each.
National Pension Scheme
148 No. 7 of 2015] (Amendment)
(b) sixty-five years if, twelve months before attaining
the pensionable age, the member notifies the
contributing employer of the member’s intention
to retire at the age of sixty-five years and the
employer approves the retirement.
(3) A member who retires in accordance with subsection (1)
or (2) and has made not less than one hundred and eighty monthly
contributions, shall be paid a pension.
Amendment 5. Section fifty-three of the principal Act is amended in
of section 53 subsection (2) by the—
(a) deletion of the word “and” at the end of paragraph (e);
(b) deletion of the full stop in paragraph (f) and the substitution
therefor of a semi-colon and the word “and”; and
(c) insertion, after paragraph (f) of the following new
paragraph:
(g) arrangements to ensure the protection of accrued
Cap. 1 pension rights as provided for in the Constitution.
